tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Over the past few decades, video games have evolved from simple pixelated pastimes 1.1. _________ a multi-billion-dollar global industry. What was once dismissed as a 1.2. _________ of time is now recognised as a legitimate form of entertainment, art, and even education. Modern games feature complex storylines that rival 1.3. _________ of Hollywood films, and their soundtracks are performed by full orchestras.

There has been considerable 1.4. _________ about whether video games have a negative influence on young people. Critics argue that excessive screen time can lead to poor concentration and social 1.5. _________. However, a growing body of 1.6. _________ suggests that certain types of games can actually sharpen problem-solving abilities and improve hand-eye coordination. The key, as 1.7. _________ most activities, lies in moderation.

Perhaps the most significant development in recent years has been the 1.8. _________ of esports. Professional gamers now compete in tournaments 1.9. _________ are broadcast to millions of viewers worldwide, and top players earn salaries comparable to those of traditional athletes. Whether or not one considers gaming a true sport, there is no 1.10. _________ that it has become a major cultural force.
